title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Julia Turc provides an in-depth analysis of the Flow Matching training algorithm, covering the physics foundations including time-variant probability densities, continuity equations, velocity fields, and optimal transport. The video compares Flow Matching with concurrent formulations like Rectified Flow and Stochastic Interpolants, explaining how these methods use learned velocity fields to generate samples from noise.
